articles.title: Iran war: Tehran warns US against ground assault - dw.com
articles.description: Iran says its forces are "waiting" for the arrival of US ground troops to "set them on fire." Meanwhile, Iran's Revolutionary Guard has threatened to strike American universities in the region. DW has more.

articles.title: Looking to limit birthright citizenship, Trump turns to an 1884 Supreme Court ruling against a Native American - NBC News
articles.description: Defending birthright citizenship changes, President Donald Trump's administration is citing an 1884 Supreme Court case called Elk v. Wilkins about voting rights for a Native American man.

articles.title: Summer travel is getting more expensive and chaotic. More Americans are staying home. - Business Insider
articles.description: High oil prices and travel uncertainty are stoking anxiety and jeopardizing summer vacation plans. More Americans are opting to stay at home.
